title: EFF is leaving X
author: gregsadetsky
aiHeadline: EFF's dramatic exit from X leaves the internet wondering if anyone even noticed they were there in the first place.

title: Meta removes ads for social media addiction litigation
author: giuliomagnifico
aiHeadline: Meta takes down ads for social media addiction lawsuits, because clearly the last thing they want is for people to realize they're addicted to their platforms.

title: Help Keep Thunderbird Alive
author: playfultones
aiHeadline: Thunderbird needs your help to stay alive, proving once again that email is the last refuge of the truly dedicated (or the truly nostalgic).

title: The Pentagon Threatened Pope Leo XIV's Ambassador with the Avignon Papacy
author: frm88
aiHeadline: The Pentagon threatens Pope Leo XIV's Ambassador with the Avignon Papacy, because nothing says 'diplomatic threat' like invoking a medieval schism.

title: Claude mixes up who said what
author: sixhobbits
aiHeadline: Claude messes up who said what, because apparently AI's greatest skill is misattributing quotes and making everyone look bad.
